name: nklisch
description: Reusable agent skills for software development workflows

skills.name: research
skills.description: Research external libs, APIs, and patterns. Use when investigating technology choices.

skills.name: extract-patterns
skills.description: Discover and document reusable code patterns. Use after implementation to capture conventions.

skills.name: refactor-plan
skills.description: Plan refactoring work. Use when code quality or structure needs improvement.

skills.name: design
skills.description: Create detailed DESIGN.md with implementation units. Use when translating a vision into code specs.

skills.name: implement
skills.description: Write code from a DESIGN.md. Use when a design exists and code needs to be written.

skills.name: implement-design
skills.description: Orchestrate implementation of a design document by spawning Sonnet task agents. Opus reads the design, splits work, crafts focused prompts, and delegates.

skills.name: verify
skills.description: Verify implementation against design. Use when code has been written and needs checking.

skills.name: fix
skills.description: Fix gaps from VERIFICATION.md. Use when verification found issues that need resolution.

skills.name: quality-gate
skills.description: Final quality assessment for a feature or phase. Use when checking if work is complete enough to move on.

skills.name: zod-v4
skills.description: Zod v4 validation library reference. Auto-loads for schemas, validation, z.object, safeParse, transforms.

skills.name: biome-v2
skills.description: Biome v2 linter/formatter reference. Auto-loads for biome config, linting rules, formatting.

skills.name: drizzle-v0
skills.description: Drizzle ORM v0.45+ PostgreSQL reference. Auto-loads for schema definitions, queries, migrations.

skills.name: hono-v4
skills.description: Hono v4 web framework reference. Auto-loads for routes, middleware, SSE, validation.

skills.name: tanstack-query-v5
skills.description: TanStack Query v5 (React Query) reference. Auto-loads for useQuery, useMutation, caching.

skills.name: tanstack-router-v1
skills.description: TanStack Router v1 reference. Auto-loads for file-based routing, loaders, search params.

skills.name: zustand-v5
skills.description: Zustand v5 state management reference. Auto-loads for stores, selectors, persist, middleware.

skills.name: tanstack-table-v8
skills.description: TanStack Table v8 headless table reference. Auto-loads for sorting, filtering, pagination, columns.

skills.name: design-principles
skills.description: Architectural principles to apply during design. Reference this when producing design documents.

skills.name: implementation-principles
skills.description: Code-level principles to apply when writing code. Reference this when implementing.

skills.name: test-quality
skills.description: Improve test quality by deriving tests from specs, designs, and contracts — not from existing code. Use when finding gaps in test coverage, designing tests for interfaces and behavioral contracts, or systematically covering edge cases and branches from a specification perspective.

skills.name: clean-memory
skills.description: Audit, validate, and interactively refine MEMORY.md. Removes contradicted and redundant entries, trims bloat, then guides you section-by-section through what to keep.

skills.name: bun
skills.description: Bun runtime reference. Auto-loads for Bun.$, Bun.file, bun:test, shell commands, file I/O, and monorepo config.

skills.name: citty
skills.description: citty CLI framework reference (UnJS). Auto-loads for defineCommand, subcommands, argument definitions, lifecycle hooks.

skills.name: clack-prompts
skills.description: @clack/prompts terminal UI reference. Auto-loads for interactive CLI prompts, spinners, selects, confirms, and cancel handling.

skills.name: smol-toml
skills.description: smol-toml TOML parser/serializer reference. Auto-loads for parse, stringify, TOML config files.

skills.name: update-documentation
skills.description: Align all documentation layers to code after implementing a feature. Covers internal specs, public website, LLM ingestion files, and project memory.

skills.name: claude-cli-sdk
skills.description: @nklisch/claude-cli-sdk reference. Auto-loads when working with this SDK — spawns Claude CLI as a subprocess using Pro/Max billing (no API key needed).

skills.name: release
skills.description: Prepare and publish a release. Drafts changelog entries from recent commits, confirms with user, then runs the release script.

skills.name: design-pages
skills.description: Design GitHub Pages for a project. Explores the codebase deeply, considers domain and audience, then pitches layout, content, structure, and visual identity choices.

skills.name: write-tool-skill
skills.description: Write agent skills for external tools, CLIs, MCP servers, and libraries. Interactive workflow with research, structure decisions, and multi-skill breakout advice.
